dependencies.description:
The GNU Compiler Collection includes front ends for C, C++, Objective-C,
Fortran, Ada, and Go, as well as libraries for these languages.
dependencies.name: gcc

dependencies.description:
GNU Make is a tool which controls the generation of executables and
other non-source files of a program from the program's source files.
dependencies.name: gmake

dependencies.description:
ImageMagick is a software suite to create, edit, compose, or convert
bitmap images.
dependencies.name: imagemagick

description:
Small C++ program to display images in a (modern) terminal using RGB
ANSI codes and unicode block graphic characters.
name: terminalimageviewer
